seo.title: Jaakiradhai Song Lyrics Yudham
seo.description: Full Jaakiradhai songs lyrics, Yudham Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Rajesh Malaravannan, Music: Pritam, Singer(s): Raftaar.
seo.keywords: Rajesh Malaravannan, Yudham, Pritam, Raftaar, Jaakiradhai full lyrics, Yudham songs lyrics, Jaakiradhai lyrics snippets, Jaakiradhai WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Jaakiradhai lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the Jaakiradhai song?

The song is energetic and upbeat, perfect for parties and celebrations.

Who are the artists behind Jaakiradhai?

The song features vocals by Raftaar with music composed by Pritam and lyrics by Rajesh Malaravannan.

What is the release year of the movie Yudham?

The movie Yudham was released in 2016.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is used in a high-energy sequence, adding to the film's dynamic and thrilling atmosphere.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Jaakiradhai is an energetic and upbeat track from the movie Yudham, capturing the essence of excitement and thrill. With Raftaar's powerful vocals and Pritam's pulsating music, the song sets the stage for a vibrant and lively atmosphere. The lyrics by Rajesh Malaravannan add a playful and dynamic touch, making it a perfect fit for party scenes. This song conveys a sense of celebration and high spirits, making it ideal for energetic gatherings and workouts.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Jaakiradhai from the movie Yudham is a high-energy track that combines Raftaar's dynamic vocals with Pritam's electrifying beats. This song is a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations, bringing a cyclone of excitement to any event. Dive into the vibrant world of Jaakiradhai and experience the pulsating rhythm that defines this unforgettable track.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, wearing shorts and a t-shirt, a cyclone is coming.
Everyone is calling to say a storm is coming here.
She won't let teasing and mocking affect her.
She will break and crush your pride, strike like lightning, and win.
Be careful, be careful, be careful.
She will burn your arrogance, better stay away from her.
She will measure you with a tape, you better behave, she will cut you down, and twist your nerves.
She won't let teasing and mocking affect her, she will break and crush your pride, strike like lightning, and win.
Be careful, be careful, be careful.
Speed is super fast, eyes are wrestling, a little girl ties her boots, now she runs like a leopard, wins medals.
She will play like a ball, jump and put a card, you blink and she disappears like lightning, she overtakes with a gun.
She won't let teasing and mocking affect her.
She will break and crush your pride, strike like lightning, and win.
Be careful, be careful, be careful.
